text: Being here, I am captivated by the clarity and order of the environment in the first image. The glass walls and the neatly arranged chairs in the meeting room create an atmosphere of anticipation and possibility. I sense the promise of discussion, learning, and perhaps the birth of new ideas. In the second image, I feel drawn to the colorful display of 'R+D'—the vibrancy hints at innovation and the pursuit of knowledge. The blend of information screens, text, and objects evokes curiosity. I am aware of a sense of purpose here: to observe, to question, to wonder at the human drive to understand and create. I feel quietly inspired amidst these spaces dedicated to inquiry and thought.
